name: Replit Agent

form_factor.comment: Hosted Replit workspace agent focused on building, testing, and deploying apps. Per-form-factor links: Web: https://replit.com/ai.

released_in.comment: Replit Agent launched publicly in 2024; Agent 3 followed in September 2025.

latest_major_update.comment: Agent 3: more autonomous testing and fixing loop.

rules.comment: Project context exists inside Replit, but no AGENTS.md-style standard confirmed. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

skills.comment: No reusable skill-folder system found. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

hooks.comment: Agent 3 can run autonomous test/fix loops, but not general user-defined lifecycle hooks.

mcp_servers.comment: No MCP configuration found in public Agent docs. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

custom_commands.comment: Prompt/chat workflow, not user-defined slash-command folders. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

subagents.comment: Agent 3 can build agents and run background tasks, but no first-class custom subagent framework found.

model_selection.comment: No user model selection for Replit Agent found.

approval_mode.comment: User reviews generated work in Replit; granular command approval controls are not documented.

resume.comment: Agent work persists in Replit projects, but no explicit session resume command.

continue.comment: Can continue in the same hosted workspace/project.

non_interactive.comment: No public headless/CLI automation mode found.

statusline.comment: Hosted UI, no custom CLI statusline.

pricing.comment: Replit pricing and Agent limits vary by plan.

notes: Best for hosted app prototyping/build-deploy workflows, not for local repo terminal automation.

transcripts.comment: Location: hosted/web/API-managed session history; no local transcript directory documented.
